title.ko: 액체에 의해 구동되는 용적형기관(액체 및 압축성유체용 용적형기관 F01; 액체용용적형기계; 유체압 액추에이터(actuator) F15B; 유체전동장치 F16H)
title.en: POSITIVE-DISPLACEMENT ENGINES DRIVEN BY LIQUIDS (positive-displacement engines for liquids and elastic fluids F01;positive-displacement machines for liquids F04;fluid-pressure actuators F15B;fluid gearing F16H)

definition.ko: 클래스 F01 앞의 기술한 (주)에 주의할 것, 특히, "용적형", "회전피스톤 기계', "요동피스톤 기계", "회전피스톤", "협동(co-operating) 부재", "협동부재들의 운동", "이(teeth) 또는 이(tooth)에 상당한 것" 및 "내부 축"에 관한 것

title.en: Reciprocating-piston liquid engines
with single cylinder, double-acting piston
with single cylinder, single-acting piston

title.ko: 실린더의 수 또는 배열에 특징이 있는 다실린더를 갖는 것(가동실린더를 갖는 것 F03C 1/22; 가변형 벽타입의 것 F03C 7/00)
title.en: with multiple cylinders, characterised by the number or arrangement of cylinders (with movable cylinders F03C0001220000;of flexible-wall type F03C0007000000)
with movement in two directions being obtained by two single-acting piston liquid engines, each acting in one direction
with cylinders in star- or fan-arrangement
the pistons co-operating with an actuated element at the outer ends of the cylinders
the pistons co-operating with an actuated element at the inner ends of the cylinders
with cylinder axes generally coaxial with, or parallel or inclined to, main shaft axis

title.ko: 특히 그것에 관계가 있는 분배밸브장치 (다실린더기관용F03C 1/34; 용적형기관 일반에 대한 것 F01C)
title.en: Distributing valve-gear peculiar thereto (for multiple-cylinder engines F03C0001340000;for engines with positive displacement in general F01L)
actuated by piston or piston-rod
mechanically
actuated by the driving liquid of the engine
Speed controlling, equalising, or cushioning
specially adapted for engines generating vibration only
with movable cylinders
in which the liquid exclusively displaces one or more pistons reciprocating in rotary cylinders
with cylinders in star- or fan-arrangement
with cylinder axes generally coaxial with, or parallel to, main shaft axis
adapted for special use or combined with apparatus driven thereby
Pistons specially adapted therefor
Cams specially adapted therefor
Cylinders specially adapted therefor
Distribution members specially adapted for multiple-cylinder engines
Cylindrical distribution members
Plate-like distribution members
Control specially adapted therefor

title.ko: 회전피스톤기관(액체가 회전실린더내를 왕복운동 하는 1개 또는 그것이상의 피스톤을 밀어 내는 것 F03C 1/24)
title.en: Rotary-piston engines (in which the liquid exclusively displaces one or more piston reciprocating in rotary cylinders F03C0001240000)

definition.ko: 그룹 F03C2/30은 그룹 F03C2/02 ~ F03C2/24에 우선함

title.en: of arcuate-engagement type, i.e. with circular translatory movement of co-operating members, each member having the same number of teeth or tooth-equivalents
of intermeshing-engagement type, i.e. with engagement of co-operating members similar to that of toothed gearing

of internal-axis type with equidirectional movement of co-operating members at the points of engagement, or with one of the co-operating members being stationary, the inner member having more teeth or tooth-equivalents than the outer member
of counter-engagement type, i.e. the movement of co-operating members at the points of engagement being in opposite directions

title.ko: 2이상의 그룹 F03C 2/02, F03C 2/08, F03C 2/22, F03C 2/24에 포함되는 특징을 갖는 것, 또는 공동부재간의 다른 운동형식을 갖고, 이들 그룹의 하나에 포함되는 특징을 갖는 것
title.en: having the characteristics covered by two or more of groups F03C0002020000, F03C0002080000, F03C0002220000, F03C0002240000 or having the characteristics covered by one of these groups together with some other type of movement between co-operating members
Oscillating-piston engines
Engines of flexible-wall type
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
